channel.title: Comments on: Episode 23 – Wee Heavy
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Steve Matthews
item.dc:creator: Steve Matthews
item.description: I don't know where you're going with this thing but it is fun to watch. Nice job, extremely laid back and entertaining. How in the world did you hook up with those two texbook examples of delayed adolesence? They do have good taste in beers though. Informative comments and reviews. Keep it up.
item.content:encoded: I don’t know where you’re going with this thing but it is fun to watch. Nice job, extremely laid back and entertaining. How in the world did you hook up with those two texbook examples of delayed adolesence? They do have good taste in beers though. Informative comments and reviews. Keep it up.

item.title: By: Justin Crandall
item.dc:creator: Justin Crandall
item.description:
Get rid of that pinkerton guy... and that david little guy...
In all seriousness, good show. I think duck rabbit's beers are awesome and deserve more appreciation for their ability to brew dark beers so well!
item.content:encoded:
Get rid of that pinkerton guy… and that david little guy…

In all seriousness, good show. I think duck rabbit’s beers are awesome and deserve more appreciation for their ability to brew dark beers so well!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description:
Seems I'm always correcting myself .. that's what comes from doing these episodes after a homebrew meeting ...
The owner and brewmaster at Duck-Rabbit is Paul Philippon. Sorry Paul ...
http://www.duckrabbitbrewery.com/huh.html
item.content:encoded:
Seems I’m always correcting myself .. that’s what comes from doing these episodes after a homebrew meeting …

The owner and brewmaster at Duck-Rabbit is Paul Philippon. Sorry Paul …

http://www.duckrabbitbrewery.com/huh.html
